name: @smart-city/proto
description: Protobuf contracts shared across Java, Python, and TypeScript services

scripts.generate: echo 'Per-language stubs are generated where they are consumed:' && echo '  Java   → protobuf-maven-plugin in apps/sensor-ingestion (Phase 2)' && echo '  Python → grpcio-tools in apps/ml-prediction (Phase 5)' && echo '  TS     → @bufbuild/buf in apps/api-gateway (Phase 9)'
